name: Forbidden City Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange chicken halves skin side up in one layer in a baking pan.
2. In a bowl, mix together butter, soy sauce, curry powder, cinnamon, ginger, garlic, and tabasco sauce until well combined.
3. Spread the mixture over the chicken and chill for one hour.
4. Preheat oven to 325°F (165°C).
5. Sprinkle sesame seeds over the chicken.
6. Bake uncovered for one hour or until golden brown.
